name: @polyshield/backend
_comment_scripts: Source-less aggregator: intentionally NO build/test scripts. pnpm -r is workspace-global regardless of cwd, so `pnpm -r build` here re-scopes the whole workspace and double-builds every package — racing two concurrent `next build`s on the frontend's .next dir (ENOENT mkdir .next/export). The sub-packages are top-level workspace members already built/tested directly by the root `pnpm -r build` / `pnpm -r test`. To build only the backend from the repo root: pnpm --filter "./packages/backend/*" build
